meta.title: Konrad Thiemann · Frontend Developer
meta.description: Frontend developer focused on Vue, Nuxt and lean, functional interfaces. E-commerce, UI libraries and AI-assisted development.

hero.intro: I build frontends that focus on what matters – with Vue and Nuxt, a soft spot for minimalism, and AI as an everyday tool.

about.title: About me
about.body: I'm a frontend developer maintaining and evolving an e-commerce shop frontend. I love reduced design that still does everything it should – and continuous learning, ideally with AI as a sparring partner.

experience.title: Experience
experience.roleSummary: Maintaining and evolving the shop frontend.
items: Building and maintaining a UI library

doewe.name: Doewe
doewe.desc: A platform for tracking and analysing personal finances: transactions, categories, budgets and insights. A monorepo with a strong focus on developer experience.

noorc.desc: A 2D jump-’n’-run for the web, built with object-oriented JavaScript and the HTML5 canvas.
